subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and revealed that which draweth the servants nigh unto the Most Great Ocean which surgeth in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما یقرب العباد الی البحر الاعظم الذی ماج فی هذا الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
